# progressHandler

**Instance Property**

A block that Photos calls periodically while downloading the image.

## Declaration

```swift
var progressHandler: PHAssetImageProgressHandler? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If you request an image whose data is not on the local device, and you have enabled downloading with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/isNetworkAccessAllowed] property, Photos calls your block periodically to report progress and to allow you to cancel the download.

## Fetching Image Data from iCloud

- **isNetworkAccessAllowed**: A Boolean value that specifies whether Photos can download the requested image from iCloud.
- **PHAssetImageProgressHandler**: The signature for a block that Photos calls while downloading asset data from iCloud. Used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/progressHandler] property.
